summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Expense Tracker MVP. Backend APIs fully functional (18/18 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly with proper design, navigation, and core functionality. Minor UI interaction issue with dropdown selection in modal.

ui_bugs.issue: Category dropdown selection requires force click - may have overlay interception

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/categories returns 6 default categories
Backend API: POST /api/expenses creates expense successfully
Backend API: GET /api/expenses returns expense list
Backend API: DELETE /api/expenses/{id} removes expense
Backend API: POST /api/budgets creates/updates budget
Backend API: GET /api/budgets returns all budgets
Backend API: DELETE /api/budgets/{id} removes budget
Backend API: GET /api/dashboard/summary returns complete summary
Backend API: POST /api/categories creates custom category
Backend API: DELETE /api/categories/{id} deletes custom category
Backend API: POST /api/insights returns AI-generated insights
Frontend: Dashboard page renders with total spent, stat cards, chart areas
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works - all pages load correctly
Frontend: Add Expense modal opens and form fields work
Frontend: Expenses page shows proper layout and filter dropdown
Frontend: Budgets page shows all categories with input fields
Frontend: Insights page has Generate Insights button
Frontend: INR currency formatting displayed correctly (₹ symbol)
Frontend: Mobile navigation responsive design works
Frontend: Design matches specifications - cyber yellow theme, glassmorphic cards
